hero.headline: Implementation specialist who bridges business needs and technical execution
hero.description: 5 years delivering enterprise SaaS implementations with deep expertise in data migration, stakeholder management, and platform configuration. 20 successful rollouts across global markets, specializing in complex multi-stakeholder projects and post-go-live optimization.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Led 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations with full ownership of data migration, platform configuration, and stakeholder coordination across UK, US, and Middle East markets.
Managed complex data migration projects involving legacy system integrations, data format standardization, and multi-tenant platform configurations tailored to client operational workflows.
Collaborated extensively with cross-functional teams including engineering, product, and support to ensure seamless technical delivery and post-implementation optimization.
Developed comprehensive documentation frameworks and process improvement initiatives that reduced implementation timelines and enhanced customer onboarding experience.

highlights.label: Process Innovation
highlights.text: Built a use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring and automated effort estimation — enabling accurate project scoping, timeline prediction, and elimination of requirement ambiguity during delivery.

highlights.label: Stakeholder Management
highlights.text: Successfully managed multi-stakeholder projects involving executives and operational teams across different time zones, ensuring effective communication and timely project delivery through structured workshop facilitation.

highlights.label: Global Implementation
highlights.text: Delivered on-site implementations in Saudi Arabia and UK for high-value engagements, managing complex data migrations and conducting stakeholder training sessions for enterprise-scale rollouts.

highlights.label: Platform Expertise
highlights.text: Achieved deep SME status across multiple product modules within 6 months, becoming the go-to resource for complex configuration challenges and serving as primary POC for technical workstreams.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed large-scale data operations and process optimization for Amazon Fresh, Pantry, and Prime Now platforms, focusing on data accuracy and operational efficiency improvements.
Designed and implemented automated data prioritization frameworks using forecasting models and inventory analytics — delivering measurable operational improvements and cost savings.
Collaborated with cross-functional support teams to streamline data workflows, reduce processing bottlenecks, and improve inter-team communication protocols.
